flags.title: Full schema replacement: generic RBAC system removed
flags.summary: The existing Prisma schema contained a generic multi-tenant RBAC system (User, Organization, Role, Permission, UserRole, UserPermissionMap, Session, AuditLog) and seed script that does not match the architecture. These were replaced with the 16 domain-specific models defined in the architecture. User explicitly approved this replacement.
flags.impact: All existing DB tables will be dropped and recreated. No production data exists (greenfield project).
flags.mitigationPlan: Greenfield project with no production data. Existing scaffold code (routes, components) references old models and will need updates by BE/FE agents.

flags.title: AuditLog model added per global_services_registry
flags.summary: The global_services_registry.json defines an auditLogService with database storage. An AuditLog model was added to support this. The model is not explicitly defined in any module's prisma_contract but is required by the audit_log middleware across 8 modules.
flags.impact: BE agent must implement audit middleware writing to this table.
flags.decision: Added as part of global foundation based on services registry specification
flags.mitigationPlan: Model fields derived from global_security_policies.json auditLogging.loggedFields: userId, action, resourceType, resourceId, timestamp, outcome, ipAddress. BE agent to confirm.

flags.title: Legacy scaffold code: 41 TS errors from pre-existing auth/permissions/security modules
flags.summary: Pre-existing scaffold code in src/app/api/auth/ (login, logout, me, register, permissions), src/app/api/roles/, src/server/auth/ (jwt, middleware), src/server/security/ (lockout, audit, rate-limit, password-rules), src/lib/permissions/, and src/config/route-permissions.ts references a db.user model and old RBAC system that no longer exist in the Prisma schema. These files produce 41 TypeScript compilation errors.
flags.impact: Legacy routes will crash at runtime if called. New middleware pipeline does not depend on these files and is not affected. Legacy code must be replaced during auth_accounts module implementation.
flags.decision: Defer cleanup to auth_accounts module phase. New pipeline is independent.
flags.mitigationPlan: auth_accounts module implementation will: (1) replace legacy auth routes with new handlers using createHandler + authService, (2) remove old src/server/auth/ directory, (3) clean up or replace old security modules that reference db.user.
evidence: tsc --noEmit: 41 errors, all in legacy files
src/server/security/lockout.ts references db.user and security.lockout (non-existent config)

flags.title: Rate limiting uses in-memory store (non-persistent)
flags.summary: rateLimitService uses a Map-based in-memory sliding window counter. Counters reset on server restart and are not shared across instances.
flags.impact: Rate limits will not persist across server restarts in development. Not an issue for single-instance MVP deployment. Must be replaced with Redis for multi-instance production.
flags.decision: Acceptable for MVP single-instance deployment per architecture note
flags.mitigationPlan: Replace in-memory Map with Redis-backed store when deploying multi-instance. Service interface is designed for drop-in replacement.

flags.title: Email service uses development adapter (no-op send)
flags.summary: emailService creates CommunicationLog entries with PENDING status but does not perform actual email delivery. The email_send_worker background job (which processes PENDING entries via provider API) is registered as a skeleton. Provider adapter implementation is deferred to communication module.
flags.impact: No emails will be sent in development. CommunicationLog entries will remain in PENDING state until email_send_worker is fully implemented.
flags.decision: Acceptable for global foundation. Adapter pattern allows provider swap at communication module implementation.
flags.mitigationPlan: Communication module implementation will: (1) implement provider adapter based on EMAIL_PROVIDER env var, (2) implement email_send_worker job handler, (3) test full email delivery pipeline.
evidence: src/server/services/emailService.ts: sendEmail creates PENDING log only
